package rulecoverage

func NegativeApiErrorTypeOutsideTransportPackage() string {
    ruleID := "api_error_type_outside_transport_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "API-facing error payload structs living in persistence or business packages instead of transport-boundary packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
